summary: The diff implements the four-module Multimedia App (MP3 Cutter, Video Cutter, Video Downloader, IP Camera) as a standalone React application integrated into the existing app via a state switch. All six requirements are substantially addressed. A few minor gaps exist: the MP3 Cutter's audio encoding relies on the Web Audio API but the diff is truncated so it's unclear if lamejs CDN loading is fully implemented. The Video Cutter loads ffmpeg from CDN lazily. The Video Downloader uses the specified API key and opens in a new tab. The IP Camera uses RTCPeerConnection for IP detection. The design system with glassmorphism, teal/cyan accents, and dark-first theme is present in index.css and components.

missing_requirements.requirement: The 'Cut & Download' button must encode trimmed audio to MP3 using a CDN-loaded lamejs or similar encoder library
missing_requirements.reason: The MP3Cutter.tsx file is truncated and the CDN-loading of lamejs or equivalent MP3 encoder is not visible in the diff. The waveform rendering is present but the actual MP3 encoding and download logic is cut off and cannot be verified.

hallucinated_features.description: A 'Multimedia' navigation button added to the existing ConvertAll Studio header to switch to the Multimedia App
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request says to create a new standalone app separate from the existing conversion tool. The implementation instead adds a Film icon button inside the existing Header component to navigate to it as a sub-view, which was not explicitly requested.

hallucinated_features.description: An ArrowLeft back button in MultimediaApp header that returns to the ConvertAll Studio app
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-87 describes a standalone app layout. Adding back-navigation to the existing conversion tool implies integration as a sub-view rather than a standalone app, which was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Copy-to-clipboard button for the detected local IP address in the IP Camera module
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-91 does not mention a copy-to-clipboard feature for the IP address. The implementation adds a copy button with copied state and CheckCheck icon.

hallucinated_features.description: Channel title and formatted video duration displayed in the Video Downloader metadata card
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-90 only requires displaying the video thumbnail and title. The implementation also fetches and displays channel title and formatted video duration from contentDetails.
